title: Marknadsproducent med grafiskt ansvar
description:
Vill du arbeta med kampanjer, event och visuellt innehåll som gör skillnad – och samtidigt vara med och utveckla ett starkt lokalt varumärke? Nu söker vi en marknadsproducent med grafiskt ansvar till vårt marknadsteam.


I rollen som marknadsproducent med grafiskt ansvar arbetar du operativt med produktion av marknads- och kommunikationsmaterial, både digitalt och tryckt. Du ansvarar för den visuella helheten och den grafiska röda tråden i vår kommunikation, och är en nyckelperson i arbetet med kampanjer, annonser och event kopplade till exempelvis sparande, bolån, ung ekonomi, pension och försäkring.


Du arbetar nära kollegor inom marknad och kommunikation samt tillsammans med verksamheten.


Tjänsten är inledningsvis en visstidsanställning på ett år.

##### **Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**

* Samordna och driva större kampanjer och event från brief till leverans
* Operativ produktion av marknads- och kommunikationsmaterial
* Säkerställa den grafiska röda tråden i allt internt och externt kommunikationsmaterial
* Produktion och leverans av digitala och tryckta annonser
* Layoutansvar för kundmagasin/kundtidning
* Ansvar för fotoproduktion samt enklare filmproduktion

##### **Vi söker dig som har**

* Har eftergymnasial utbildning inom grafisk design, kommunikation, digital design eller motsvarande
* Har mycket god vana av Adobe Creative Cloud, särskilt InDesign och Photoshop
* Har kunskap om och erfarenhet av grafisk produktion för både digitala och tryckta kanaler
* Har erfarenhet av enklare foto- och filmproduktion
* Är van att arbeta utifrån varumärkesplattformar och grafiska riktlinjer
* Har grundläggande förståelse för hur projekt och kampanjer drivs
* Har du erfarenhet från byrå, kommunikationsavdelning eller marknadsteam samt tidigare ansvar för trycksaker, magasin eller större kampanjer är det meriterande

##### **Teknisk kompetens som vi önskar att du har**

* Mycket goda kunskaper i Adobe Photoshop och InDesign
* Förståelse för digitala annonsformat och sociala medier
* Har du arbetat med videoredigering (t.ex. Premiere eller After Effects) och är van vid att arbeta i projekt- eller planeringsverktyg som Planner, Asana eller Trello är det meriterande

##### **Som person är du**


Strukturerad och lösningsorienterad, du är kreativ med öga för detaljer. Du trivs med att arbeta i ett högt tempo där flera produktioner pågår parallellt. Du tar ansvar för leverans, samarbetar gärna med andra och bidrar aktivt till teamets utveckling.

##### **Ansökan**


Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 22 mars 2026.  

Vi hanterar inkomna ansökningar löpande så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.

##### **Frågor**


Du är varmt välkommen med dina frågor till vår Marknads- och kommunikationschef, 0511-281 28, anna.lindblad@sparbankenskaraborg.se


Titta gärna in på vår hemsida och Instagram-konto om du vill se mer av oss och vår vardag!

##### **Om oss**


Sparbanken Skaraborg är en affärsnära sparbank med uppgift att vara en trygg och långsiktig partner för våra kunder inom privat och företagsmarknaden. Vi finns här, i hjärtat av Skaraborg med mötesplatser i Skara, Vara, Götene och Nossebro. Våra beslut fattas lokalt, vårt huvudkontor finns i Skara och vi ägs av Sparbanksstiftelsen Skaraborg, som innebär att vi alla tillsammans har ett stort samhällsengagemang. Vi är proaktiva och tillgängliga med 130 medarbetare och specialister som har en bred kompetens och förståelse för det som gör skillnad.


Vårt löfte är att ständigt utvecklas, tänka nytt och se till att medarbetare och kunder växer. Här möts du av ett utvecklande ledarskap som ser dig som vår viktigaste resurs. Välkommen att växa med oss!

title: Creative Digital & Video Manager till Ving
description:
**Vi söker en Creative Digital & Video Manager som vill ta ansvar för vår digitala produktion och utveckla hur vi skapar rörligt och digitalt innehåll i världsklass – för både varumärke och affär.**

**Vill du leda och utveckla ett internt kreativt team med fokus på video, motion och högpresterande digitalt innehåll? Är du lika trygg i den kreativa visionen som i det operativa genomförandet – och drivs av att kombinera storytelling med datadriven optimering? Då kan det här vara din nästa roll.**

### **Om tjänsten**


I rollen leder du vår interna digitala kreativa produktion med särskilt fokus på video och motion. Du ansvarar för att säkerställa att vårt rörliga och digitala innehåll håller hög kreativ och teknisk nivå, är plattformsanpassat och driver mätbara resultat i linje med kampanj- och affärsmål.


Tjänsten ingår i vår Inhouse avdelning, Brand & Creative Production, och du rapporterar till Head of Brand and Creative Production. Du har personalansvar för ett team om fem medarbetare.


Rollen är både strategisk och operativ – du sätter riktningen för vår digitala produktion, samtidigt som du själv är aktiv i det dagliga arbetet.

* Säkerställa att innehåll är engagerande, konverteringsdrivande och optimerat för respektive plattform
* Driva den kreativa processen från koncept till färdig leverans tillsammans med övriga Creativ Leads (AD, Copy och SoMe)
* Kombinera strategiskt utvecklingsansvar med operativ produktion
* Fungera som kvalitetsägare för rörligt och digitalt innehåll
* Skala och optimera videoinnehåll utifrån data och performance-insikter
* Integrera AI-verktyg och automation i kreativa arbetsflöden för ökad effektivitet och innovation
* Etablera best practice inom digital storytelling, formatutveckling och plattformsanpassning
* Coacha och utveckla teamets kreativa och digitala kompetenser

### **Vem vi söker**

##### **Vi önskar att du uppfyller följande punkter:**

* Minst 6 års erfarenhet från digital content- eller reklambyrå, alternativt internt kreativt/produktionsteam
* Kompetens inom video- och motionproduktion för digitala kanaler
* Erfarenhet av att leda och inspirera kreativa team
* Erfarenhet av att jobba med digitala kanaler och följa hur kreativ prestation påverkar engagemang och konvertering
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta datadrivet och performance-orienterat
* Teknisk kompetens inom Adobe Creative Cloud, Premiere Pro, After Effects m fl
* Erfarenhet och intresse för AI-verktyg och hur de kan förbättra kreativa processer


Du är en strategisk och prestigelös ledare som gärna arbetar hands-on och håller dig nyfiken på ny teknik och nya format. Med en stark känsla för kreativt varumärkesbyggande skapar du engagerande, datadrivet och plattformsanpassat innehåll. Du är strukturerad, resultatorienterad och trivs i ett agilt arbetssätt där du kombinerar både effektivitet och kvalitet i din leverans. Som ledare inspirerar och coachar du teamet, skapar tydlighet och energi med en kommunikativ och lösningsorienterad approach.

### **Vi erbjuder**


Vi erbjuder en spännande och utvecklande miljö där du får möjlighet till en intern karriär. Du får en omväxlande vardag tillsammans med härliga kollegor - vi arbetar i nära samarbete mellan de nordiska länderna för att ge våra gäster de bästa veckorna på året. Vi har dessutom ett högt medarbetarengagemang som år efter år visar sig i vår interna medarbetarundersökning. Vi älskar vårt jobb och välkomnar dig ombord på vår resa i Nordic Leisure Travel Group!

### **Övrigt**


Sista ansökningsdag: 20 mars


Vår huvudkontor ligger i Stockholm, och vi har även lokala kontor i Oslo, Köpenhamn och Helsingfors.


För frågor om tjänsten kontakta: Camilla Miranda, Head of Brand & Creative Production, camilla.miranda@nltg.com

 *Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!*

***I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av tester från Alva Labs – ett logiskt problemlösningstest och en personlighetsanalys. Testerna utgår från vedertagen forskning och ger oss möjlighet att på ett mer objektivt sätt bedöma dina styrkor och eventuella utmaningar i relation till aktuell tjänst. Du får mer information när du skickat in din ansökan, men om du är nyfiken redan nu kan du läsa mer hos*** ***Alva Labs******.***
company_description: Ving är en av Sveriges ledande researrangörer med resor till drygt 400 resmål i över 60 länder. Ving är en del av den nordiska resekoncernen Nordic Leisure Travel Group.

title: Senior Engineering Manager - Platform
description:
*SEB Embedded is on a mission to push the boundaries of financial services and we are looking for a Senior Engineering Manager to lead the Platform domain!*

**About the team**
------------------


The Platform domain is responsible for maximizing developer & employee experience while handling the regulations in our industry including a modern security function. This specifically includes owning our Google Cloud environment, Backstage, our workspace tooling, laptop management, data infrastructure and more. The domain consists of three teams with a mix of security-, data- and platform engineers.

**What you will do**
--------------------


In this role you have an important part in fostering a collaborative and supportive work environment delivering engineering excellence. As a Senior Engineering Manager you will ensure that the team is set up for success, supporting them to reach deliverables as well as enabling effective collaborations and professional growth.


As a Senior Engineering Manager you will:

* Provide coaching to Engineering Managers, contribute to leadership growth and team performance.
* Manage Profit and Loss (PNL) including the full GCP cost and play a key role in the domain’s strategic direction.
* Contribute to business unit direction decisions as part of the extended management group.
* Accountable for organization and technology health across multiple teams.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-impact projects across multiple domains, ensuring alignment with both business and technical objectives.
* Foster an inclusive and collaborative culture by mentoring engineers from diverse backgrounds and encouraging knowledge-sharing through presentations and technical workshops.

**Who you are**
---------------


You showcase adaptability and helpfulness, and as a Senior Engineering Manager you’ll be part of fostering a culture that welcomes innovative solutions in the team. You will lead the engineering teams through your accountable, challenge-ready, and collaborative approach. In the role you also need to have an open mindset and see the potential for failure as a pathway to progress.


To succeed in this role you have:

* Proven track record of leading successful engineering teams, as well as understanding of engineering excellence practices.
* Ability to collaborate and communicate effectively with different stakeholders and collaboration partners.
* An interest in supporting others in their growth journey, coaching and mentoring.
* Previous experience managing managers and delivering complex projects to production giving you the ability to anticipate challenges.
* An innovative and flexible mindset, enabling you to support the team when encountering new challenges.

**What we offer**
-----------------


We offer the best of both worlds; the stability and security of an established company together with the innovation and energy of a scale-up. As part of your journey, working alongside exceptional colleagues, we want to make sure to nurture your skills while you contribute to our collective success!

**Application**
---------------


We will review applications on an ongoing basis.
  

  

Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.

title: Experienced Cloud Strategy & Architecture Leader
description:
Deloitte is a leading global provider of audit and assurance, consulting, financial advisory, risk advisory, tax, and related services. During its 175-year history, our organization has grown tremendously in both scale and capabilities. Deloitte currently has approximately 415,000 people in more than 150 countries and territories, and serves four out of five Fortune Global 500® companies. Yet, our shared culture and mission—to make an impact that matters—remains unchanged. This is evident not only in Deloitte’s work for clients, but also in our WorldClass ambition, our WorldClimate initiative and our ALL IN diversity and inclusion strategy.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Are you ready for the next step in your career and to join our team in Sweden?**
  

 Deloitte's business area Technology & Transformation Nordic is a market leader and works together with decision-makers in both global and local organizations. We support organizations in their challenges regarding strategy issues and in the implementation of complex transformations that often include major business-driven IT changes.
   

  

  

  

**Cloud Strategy & Architecture Leader**
  

 The Swedish Engineering Leader for Cloud Strategy and Architecture is responsible for overseeing the strategic direction and operational management and growth of Deloitte Sweden’s Cloud Strategy & Architecture offering. This includes driving business growth, managing financial performance, and delivering high-quality cloud services to our clients. The role involves building and nurturing client relationships, supporting technology partnerships, identifying market opportunities, sales and developing go-to-market strategies. Additionally, it requires leading a team of cloud professionals, fostering a culture of innovation, working cross-Nordics to grow the cloud program, and leading client engagement.
   

  





  

  

 At Deloitte you will be part of a wider global network of highly skilled Cloud specialists and work in advisory projects together with consultants across our Deloitte network.
   

  

  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**We seek people with interest in Cloud technology and related architecture, in combination with the following qualifications:**



* You are working and living in Sweden
* A relevant university master’s degree, preferably in engineering or computer science and 15+ years’ work experience
* Proficiency in Swedish and English and strong communication skills
* Proven experience in leading and managing cloud business units, with an emphasis cross-border
* Strong understanding of cloud technologies and industry trends
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills
* Strategic thinker with the ability to envision and implement growth strategies
* Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams and stakeholders
* Demonstrated ability to grow a business


**Additional Information**

**What we offer**
  

 At Deloitte we focus on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths. By on-the-job learning experiences, formal development programs at Deloitte University and support from a personal coach, you will have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout your career. The way of working at Deloitte – our commitment to you.
   

  





**How to apply**
  

 Your application should consist of a CV and a cover letter and you apply directly online. Please apply as soon as possible as we will review the applications on an ongoing basis.
   

  





 As a qualitative part of Deloitte's recruitment process, our final candidates undergo a background check, to increase awareness of our future employees, secure the working environment for our employees and meet regulatory requirements. The background check process is carried out in collaboration with ToFindOut.
   

  





**Questions?**
  

 If you have any questions regarding the role, please contact Christine Cederberg, chrcederberg@deloitte.se. For questions regarding the application process, please contact Anna Taube, ataube@deloitte.se.
   

  





**We are looking forward to your application!**
  

  

  

 For further information on Deloitte, please visit www.deloitte.se
   

  





**What impact will you make?**




 Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. We do not just aspire to make solutions. We wish to create an impact that makes a positive and crucial difference for the people around us, our clients and our society. Deloitte is where you’ll find unlimited opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.

title: Channel Partner Manager
description:
The Channel and Ecosystems team is dedicated to accelerating Asana's growth and market reach through partnerships and fostering a thriving partner network. We build and nurture relationships with Channel Partners (VARs, Services Partners, Distributors, Systems Integrators), Technology Partners (ISVs, App Partners) and Strategic Alliances to support Asana customers across geographies through our partners' specialized expertise, consulting and technical capabilities. Our team collaborates closely with internal cross-functional teams to align partner efforts with company objectives and ensure that partners are engaged through comprehensive enablement, program support and resources.
   

  

 As a quota-carrying Channel Partner Lead you will report to and work closely with our Head of EMEA Channel Partnerships to drive and shape the future of Channel Business across the Nordics and BeNeLux region. You will be building up the Partner Ecosystem in this fast growing region and act as the Face of Asana for Channel Partners ranging from Value-added Resellers and Solution Partners to Service Delivery and Tech Integration Partners. You will be a part of our Global Channel Partnerships Team, which is focused on building and driving efficient, sustainable and scaling paths through our partner ecosystem to win and manage successful, profitable and long-term customer relationships.
   

  

 This role is based either in Sweden (remote) or in London with an office-centric hybrid schedule. The standard in-office days are Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday. Most Asanas have the option to work from home on Wednesdays. Working from home on Fridays depends on the type of work you do and the teams with which you partner. If you're interviewing for this role, your recruiter will share more about the in-office requirements.
   

  

**What you’ll achieve:**
* Develop and manage long-term partner relationships throughout our ecosystem.
* Track and be responsible for metrics in your assigned region(s) Nordics & Benelux, primarily go to market plans, pipeline and revenue, that indicate partner success. You will own a quota.
* Identify, recruit, and onboard partners in the EMEA NORTH region (OKRs)
* Execute a scalable and in-depth onboarding experience for partners
* Collaborate with partners to develop a strong regional plan and manage co-marketing activities such as events, webinars, etc.
* Maintain and support ongoing partner relationships, including partners’ capabilities to provide post-sales services
* Work cross functionally with our internal teams to ensure our partners have the support and materials they need to succeed
* Work cross functionally with our direct sales team to build and execute successful hybrid (co-sell) motions.


**About you:**
* Demonstrates curiosity about AI tools and emerging technologies, with a willingness to learn and leverage them to enhance productivity, collaboration, or decision-making
* 6+ years of previous channel experience with a cloud software company
* Experience with various IT partnerships such as Solution Providers, AWS, Distributors, Large Account Resellers, and SI’s
* Fluency in English and Swedish
* Have strong working knowledge of Swedish and Netherlands markets
* Thoughtful about the strategy and metrics you set, but also able to execute on those
* Identifies major strategic initiatives and creates a plan to execute against them
* Builds trust and respect in all their working relationships, , multi region partner leaders/stakeholders
* Produces and reports on strategic plans and initiatives for the assigned territory
* Knowledgeable about the B2B/SaaS sales motion, and able to ensure that partners can successfully replicate that when selling Asana
* Collaborative Work Management experience highly valued
* Experience in closing deals and working with mid market and Enterprise segments
* Experience selling to EMEA North based organisations via channel partners
* Experience working in a hybrid (co-sell) sales environment


**What We’ll Offer**
 Our comprehensive compensation package plays a big part in how we recognize you for the impact you have on our path to achieving our mission. We believe that compensation should be reflective of the value you create relative to the market value of your role. To ensure pay is fair and not impacted by biases, we're committed to looking at market value which is why we check ourselves and conduct a yearly pay equity audit.
   

  

 For this role, the estimated OTE salary range is between 1,056,000- 1,200,000 SEK. The actual base salary will vary based on various factors, including market and individual qualifications objectively assessed during the interview process. The listed range above is a guideline, and the base salary range for this role may be modified.
   

  

 In addition to base salary, your compensation package will include additional components such as equity, sales incentive pay (for most sales roles), and benefits. If you're interviewing for this role, speak with your Talent Acquisition Partner to learn more about the total compensation and benefits for this role.
   

  

 We strive to provide equitable and competitive benefits packages that support our employees worldwide and include:
   

  

* Mental health, wellness & fitness benefits
* Career coaching & support
* Inclusive family building benefits
* Long-term savings or retirement plans
* In-office culinary options to cater to your dietary preferences


 These are just some of the benefits we offer, and benefits may vary based on role, country, and local regulations. If you're interviewing for this role, speak with your Talent Acquisition Partner to learn more about the total compensation and benefits for this role.
   

  

**About Us**
 Asana is a leading platform for human + AI collaboration. Millions of teams around the world rely on Asana to achieve their most important goals, faster. Asana has been named to Fortune's Best Workplaces for 7+ years and recognized by Fast Company, Forbes, and Gartner for excellence in workplace culture and innovation. We offer an exceptional office-centric culture while adopting the best elements of hybrid models to ensure that every one of our global team members can work together effortlessly. With 13+ offices all over the world, we are always looking for individuals who care about building technology that drives positive change in the world and a culture where everyone feels that they belong.
   

  

**Join Asana’s Talent Network** 
 to stay up to date on job opportunities and life at Asana.

title: Product Manager – User Platform
description:
Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  





 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world. Join Visa and do work that matters — to you, to your community, and to the world.
   

  





 Progress starts with you.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 Tink was founded in 2012, and a decade later became part of Visa in 2022. Tink was created with the aim of changing the banking industry for the better. We have built Europe’s most robust open banking platform – with the broadest, deepest connectivity and powerful services that create value out of the financial data. We offer the tools that allow anyone – from big banks and fintech to startups – to build the future of financial services across Europe.
   

  





 The Product and Business Enablement area at Tink has a clear mission: to build the foundational platform services that power our entire product ecosystem. We are a tightly knit team with product managers, backend and frontend engineers, platform architects, and data specialists. By building robust, scalable, and well-designed platform services, we enable product teams across Tink to deliver exceptional value to customers and end users.
   

  

 What you will do:
   

  





 We are looking for a Product Manager to own and drive the User Platform – a critical backend service that manages user identity, authentication, session management, and user lifecycle across Tink's product suite. This platform underpins how we identify, authenticate, and serve millions of end users around the world, providing the foundation for personalised experiences, security, and compliance.
   

  

 Responsibilities:
   

  




* Define and own the product roadmap for the User Platform, balancing technical debt, scalability requirements, and business needs
* Work closely with backend engineers to define requirements for APIs, data models, and service architectures
* Collaborate with product teams across Tink to understand their user identity and authentication requirements, translating these into platform capabilities
* Partner with security, compliance, and legal teams to ensure the platform meets regulatory requirements (GDPR, PSD2, etc.) and security standards
* Define service-level objectives (SLOs) in partnership with engineering
 **,** 
 monitor platform health, and drive improvements to reliability, performance, and scalability
* Manage platform dependencies and integrations with third-party identity providers, authentication services, and internal systems
* Create clear technical documentation and API specifications to enable seamless integration by internal product teams
* Balance competing priorities from multiple stakeholders while maintaining platform stability and forward progress
* Drive data-informed decision-making by defining key metrics, monitoring platform usage, and analysing user behaviour patterns



 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**
* We are looking for a technically minded product manager who can bridge the gap between engineering teams and business requirements. You should be comfortable working with backend systems, APIs, and platform architecture while maintaining a clear focus on delivering value to internal and external stakeholders.
* Product management experience at a technology company, with at least some of that time focused on platform, infrastructure, or backend services
* Strong technical background – you should be comfortable reading API documentation, understanding system architecture diagrams, and discussing technical trade-offs with engineers
* Experience with API design, service-oriented architectures, or platform development is highly desirable
* Understanding of authentication and authorisation concepts (OAuth, JWT, session management, etc.)
* Familiarity with identity management, user lifecycle management, or related domains is a plus
* Demonstrated ability to prioritise competing requirements and manage platform roadmaps
* Strong written and verbal communication skills – you'll be creating technical documentation, API specs, and stakeholder updates
* Data-driven decision-making approach with experience defining and tracking platform metrics
* Familiarity with distributed systems, microservices, or cloud infrastructure is beneficial


**Additional Information**

 Visa is an EEO Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
\*MUST SPEAK FLUENT SWEDISH & ENGLISH\*
 



  





**WE ARE INSIGHT** 




 At Insight Enterprises, we are not just a tech company - we are a people-first company. We believe that by unlocking the power of people and technology, we can accelerate transformation and achieve extraordinary results. As a Fortune 500 Solutions Integrator with deep expertise in cloud, data, AI, cybersecurity, and intelligent edge we guide organisations through complex digital decisions.
 



  





  





**SALES DEVELOPMENT REPRESENTATIVE RESPONSIBILITIES** 




 To be an integral part of the Go To Market team, developing inbound generated leads, self-generate leads through traditional and innovative prospecting methods whilst taking a solution led approach. The role will be fully supported by the marketing and creative team, who will provide all the necessary tools, information and education, to make this critical role a success.
 



  





  





**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:** 




 · Ability to identify, develop and nurture leads (prospective clients)
 



 · Be tenacious and resilient with a can-do and will-do attitude
 



 · Excellent all-round communication skills (Verbal, Listening, Written)
 



 · Work with a high level of velocity and volume
 



 · Have excellent interpersonal skills and be a true team player
 



 · Keeping the CRM up to date with profile and business insights, contact reports and actions
 



 · Be creative with ability think outside the box
 



 · Identify and develop potential markets and verticals
 



 · Be able to adapt and embrace change
 



 · Other duties as assigned
 



  





  





**ROLE REQUIREMENTS:** 



* 2 years’ experience in SaaS, Tech or B2B Sales
* Experience working within Go-To-Market / Revenue Generation Teams
* Organised and excellent task and cadence management
* Communication skills
* Prospecting skills (cold-calling, email outreach, social outreach)
* Product knowledge
* Naturally inquisitive and continuous learner
* Languages - fluent in both Swedish & English

title: Solution Architect Master Data
description:
**För En Hållbar Framtid Tillsammans**
 Coop är Sveriges största kooperation och en ledande aktör inom dagligvaruhandeln, med över 4 miljoner medlemmar. Vi har ett stort fokus på hållbarhet och arbetar för att skapa en mer grön och rättvis framtid genom att erbjuda hållbara produkter och tjänster.
   

  

 Vi tror på att en mångfald av perspektiv och erfarenheter är nyckeln till att skapa en mer inkluderande och framgångsrik arbetsplats. Därför välkomnar vi alla oavsett kön, ålder, bakgrund och etnisk tillhörighet.
   

  

**Bli en del av Coop – Tillsammans gör vi mat-Sverige hållbart!**
**Om Tjänsten**
 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens hållbara dagligvaruhandel samtidigt som du bidrar till Coops digitala utveckling?
   

  

 Vi söker en erfaren och drivande Solution Architect inom SAP Master Data som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för att forma, utveckla och framtidssäkra vår masterdata-arkitektur. Hos oss får du en nyckelroll i att säkerställa en stabil, skalbar och affärsanpassad SAP-miljö – samtidigt som du gör verklig skillnad för verksamhetens effektivitet och datakvalitet.
   

  

 Du blir en del av Coops centrala IT-organisation inom Affärslösningar och Plattformar, där du arbetar tvärfunktionellt med IT, verksamheten och leverantörer. Här får du kombinera din tekniska kompetens med din förmåga att se helheten och vara rådgivare i frågor som rör arkitektur, systemval och framtida lösningar.
   

  

 I rollen ansvarar du för arkitektur inom Master Data, där SAP är en central del i Coops digitala ekosystem. Du vägleder kring arkitekturprinciper och riktlinjer, säkerställer att våra IT-lösningar realiseras på ett korrekt sätt och att de ger verkligt värde för både affär och kund.
   

  

 Du arbetar strategiskt och operativt, nära både verksamheten och utvecklingsteamen, och deltar i att driva och kvalitetssäkra både större och mindre förändringsinitiativ inom området Master Data.
   

  

**Som Solution Architect Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* Ansvara för helhetslösningarnas arkitektur, inklusive integration och livscykelhantering.
* Säkerställa att arkitekturprinciper, riktlinjer och standarder följs och tillämpas.
* Följa upp och kravställa lösningarnas kvalitetsegenskaper som prestanda, skalbarhet och robusthet.
* Granska förändringsinitiativ och projekt utifrån nytta, kostnad och förvaltning.
* Fungera som rådgivare till chefer och team i arkitektur- och designfrågor.
* Bidra till att forma framtida strategier för hur våra IT-lösningar ska stödja verksamheten på bästa sätt.
* Designa och vidareutveckla SAP Master Data-lösningar
* Säkerställa hög datakvalitet och stabilitet genom robusta processer och tekniska lösningar.
* Driva kravdialoger, workshops och designbeslut tillsammans med verksamhet, utvecklingsteam och externa partners.
* Fungera som arkitekturell rådgivare vid förändringsinitiativ och SAP-relaterade projekt.


***Vem är du?***
 Vi söker dig som har en stark teknisk grund, men också förmågan att se till helheten, hur IT och affär samspelar. Du trivs i en rådgivande roll där du får påverka riktning, kvalitet och arbetssätt, och där du samarbetar nära både verksamhet och leverantörer.
   

  

 Som person är du kommunikativ, nyfiken och prestigelös samt att du motiveras av att guida andra, diskutera lösningar och driva förändring tillsammans med kollegor från olika delar av organisationen.
   

  

**För att vara framgångsrik i rollen ser vi att du har:**
* Akademisk utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande erfarenhet.
* Djup förståelse för SAP som plattform och dess roll i affärsprocesser.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med arkitekturprinciper, integrationer och systemdesign.
* God förståelse för affärsprocesser inom retail.
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av SAP Master Data och därtill relaterade moduler.
* Mycket god förståelse för datamodellering, dataintegrationer och datagovernance.
* Erfarenhet av arkitekturarbete i större organisationer.
* Förmåga att leda designbeslut och driva förbättringar i nära samarbete med verksamheten.
* Meriterande: erfarenhet av S/4HANA, MDG samt CAR


**Meriterande Om Du Har Erfarenhet Av**
* Deltagit i SAP-utrullningar
* SAP S/4, CAR, MDG
* ABAP (kunna läsa kod)
* Jira and Focused Build
* Information Steward eller motsvarande datakvalitetssystem
* Arbetat med LeanIX eller motsvarande arkitekturverktyg.


***Vårt erbjudande till dig***
 Hos Coop får du vara med och driva den digitala utvecklingen i en av Sveriges mest välkända och värderingsdrivna organisationer. Vi erbjuder en inkluderande och inspirerande kultur, där du får växa och utvecklas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor – alltid med hållbarhet och affärsnytta i fokus.
   

  

 Du får arbeta med moderna lösningar, nära verksamheten och med stort inflytande på framtida arkitekturstrategier. Vi erbjuder också konkurrenskraftiga förmåner, flexibel arbetstid och god balans mellan arbete och fritid.
   

  

**Så Ansöker Du**
 Låter detta som din nästa utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt då vi arbetar löpande med urval och intervjuer. För att rättvist matcha kandidater med de krav som rollen ställer kommer vi att använda tester under urvalsarbetet.
   

  

 Om du har några frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Henrik Frick på e-postadress: Henrik.Frick@coop.se

title: Engineering Manager
description:
Do you see the potential in every team member and step up when leadership is needed? We’re looking for passionate, empathetic leaders who want to bring out the best in people while building value-driven software development teams. We believe in simplicity and a just-do-it attitude, where everyone is empowered to contribute and make a difference.
   

  

 Do you combine a strong technical foundation built on hands-on coding experience with curiosity, passion, and a genuine interest in leadership? If so, come join us and make an impact.
   

  

**As an Engineering Manager, you will**
* Build and lead collaborative and empowered teams
* Support the growth and development of Engineers
* Create a learning environment
* Champion Nordnet's tech strategy and ensure we maintain technical excellence in all aspects of our team.
* Lead by example, guiding your team through technical challenges and problem-solving.
* Practice servant leadership by enabling and empowering others
* Learn, share and collaborate closely with other Engineering Managers


**You And Your Skills**
* You have a strong technical background and when needed can dive into technical discussions
* You have worked with leadership, developing and growing product development teams.
* You are curious and open-minded, have an always learning mindset and see mistakes as opportunities for growth.
* You are supportive and caring, lead with empathy, transparency, and trust
* You are a change leader, brave in pushing through friction
* You have a degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field
* You prefer working in the office


**Culture at Nordnet Engineering**
* A just-do-it attitude, where everyone feels enabled and valued
* We live and breathe technology taking pride in our work
* We take a scientific approach by experimenting and learning
* We welcome new ideas and encourage everyone to speak up
* We are curious and forward leaning


**This is us**
 At Nordnet, technology is at the core of everything we do, driving innovation and maintaining our competitive edge. As an Engineering Manager, you'll be at the forefront of leveraging cutting-edge technology like Google Cloud Platform, React/React Native, and Java to shape our web and mobile experiences. We’ve made over 30 000 production releases this year, releasing our web every other hour and our app every two days.
   

  

 We offer you the opportunity to work in a Nordic environment with a strong focus on delivery, product development and technology. Our ambitions are high and you will embark on a fast and challenging journey together with a skillful team of sharp and committed colleagues.
   

  

 Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We’re proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.
   

  

 In 1996, Nordnet redefined the financial world as the first digital bank in Europe. Now we are about to do it again with the aim of creating the next generation of bank, in the cloud. We know that this requires great people, great teams, and great technology.
   

  

**Do you want to join us and build the new Nordnet?**
 Apply today! – Please note that we only accept applications through our recruitment system. We do not consider email applications.
   

  

 If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our Talent Acquisition Partner, Lovisa Malmberg, lovisa.malmberg@nordnet.se.
   

  

 At Nordnet, we value diversity and inclusion, and we are committed to creating an environment where everyone can succeed.
   

  

 As part of our recruitment process, we conduct mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Full-Stack Engineer – AI Intelligence Platform** 

  





**TL;DR** 





 We’re building
 
**MyTelescope** 

 , an AI system that acts like a brand marketing consultant.
 





 It analyzes human behaviour and generates insights and recommendations for brand strategy, messaging, and marketing decisions.
 





 We’re looking for a
 
**Full-Stack Engineer** 

 to help build the intelligence platform behind it.
 





 You’ll work on
 
**AI systems, data pipelines, and product infrastructure** 

 that turn large-scale behavioural data into decision tools used by companies.
   






**About MyTelescope** 




**MyTelescope enables teams to build brands people love.** 





 The platform turns human behaviour into insights and recommendations for brand strategy and marketing decisions. Teams use it to understand what people are interested in, how markets are shifting, and what to do next.
 




  






 We help teams from
 
**solopreneurs to enterprises** 

 build stronger brands.
 




  






 We’re a
 
**small, high-caliber team in Stockholm** 

 building a generation-defining AI company. We value ownership, rapid iteration, and low-ego collaboration.
   






**The Problem** 





 Understanding people at scale is extremely difficult.
 





 Companies rely on surveys, reports, and intuition to make brand decisions.
 





 We’re building systems that transform large-scale human behaviour into
 
**structured intelligence and strategic recommendations** 

 .
   






**The Work** 





 You will help build the
 
**core intelligence platform** 

 behind MyTelescope.
 




  






 This includes:
 



* building scalable APIs and backend systems
* designing data pipelines that process behavioural data
* integrating LLMs and agent workflows
* shipping product features across the stack
* evolving the architecture as the platform scales



  






 You will
 
**own systems end-to-end** 

 , from design to production.
   






**What We’re Looking For** 



* 3+ years of software engineering experience building production systems.
* Strong backend skills (Python preferred).
* Experience building APIs, distributed systems, or data-heavy backends.
* Comfort working across the stack (JavaScript / TypeScript frontend).
* Interest in AI systems, LLMs, and intelligent automation.
* Strong fundamentals in system design, debugging, and clean code.
* Curiosity, ownership, and a bias toward shipping.
* Experience with
 
**Google Cloud Platform** 

 is a plus.



  





**Stack** 




**Frontend:** 





 React · TypeScript
 




**Backend:** 





 Python · JavaScript / TypeScript
 




**Cloud:** 





 Google Cloud Platform
 




**AI:**

title: Expert Python Engineer
description:
**Job ID: 2216**
 Are you passionate about finance and IT, and want to take the next step in your career? We are currently looking for a motivated and dynamic person to join our Capital Management Software Development team at Nordea. In our team, we pride ourselves on engineering solutions and direct Nordea’s transformation by providing a holistic technological view and structured understanding of the bank, and its surrounding environment to enable the Customer Vision and the Business Strategy.
   

  

 We are now looking for an Expert Python Engineer to join our journey to develop and implement our next generation capital solutions. Our team’s role is to add value by providing the required engineering excellence and expertise in different technologies to enable delivering the Capital Management agenda through the Capital and Risk Train (CART).
   

  

**About This Opportunity**
 Meet the Capital Management Software Development team. Our team is filled with international, diverse, and highly skilled professionals, working with a broad range of technology support that spans across the entire bank. The team is defined by a high work ethic, engineering culture and a strong mindset towards enabling high customer and user-oriented IT services. Collaboration, ownership, passion, and courage is therefore of utmost importance when joining this team, since these are the values that guide us in being, and performing, at our best.
   

  

 The team is located in Sweden and Poland, and this position is located in Stockholm, Sweden and Gdansk / Gdynia / Warszawa, Poland.
   

  

**What you’ll be doing:**
* Support applications in an agile development way by coordinating, planning and mainly leading the required engineering in the Capital and Risk Train (an Agile Release Train)
* Participate in major improvements and full-stack development tasks as lead developer to support own unit to add value, and deliver according to targets
* Provide technical vision and leadership and define best practice within own area of expertise to enhance technical capabilities and solutions


**Who You Are**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the four key values that guide us in being at our best. We imagine that you enjoy learning and are excited about bringing your ideas to the table. You’re dependable, willing to speak up – even when it’s difficult – and committed to empowering others.
   

  

**To succeed in this role, we believe that you have:**
* Minimum of 5 years’ documented experience in full-stack Python development (full-stack serving web backend, e.g. Flask, Fastapi or similar)
* Professional experience in React (Angular experience is considered relevant experience) and Typescript
* Professional experience and/or knowledge of Agile, Scrum or SAFe including BizDevOps
* Academic degree in computer sciences, mathematics or engineering
* Proficiency in English is a must have skill
* Have a good understanding of Regulatory Reporting for European Banks


**It would be ideal if you also:**
* Have professional experience in Docker, Snowflake and CICD experience with git/bitbucket, AI coding assistance or Cloud/AWS platforms


 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 We kindly ask you to submit your application as soon as possible, but no later than 08/03/2026. Any applications or CVs sent by email, direct messages, or any other channel than our application forms, will not be accepted or considered.
   

  

 At Nordea, we know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable workplace. We deeply believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics, and traits make us better at serving our customers and communities. If you have any questions about our recruitment process, please reach out to tech recruiter and main point of contact anna.dahlstrom@consult.nordea.com.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact Finansförbundet at finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACO at SacoNordea@nordea.com.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Poland:** 
 Please include permit for processing personal data in CV as following:
   

  

 In accordance with art. 6 (1) a and b. Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, and repealing Directive 95/46/EC (General Data Protection Regulation) hereinafter ‘GDPR’. I agree to have: my personal data, education and employment history proceeded for the purposes of current and future recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp.
   

  

 The administrator of your personal data is: Nordea Bank Abp operating in Poland through its Branch, address: Aleja Edwarda Rydza Śmiglego 20, 93-281 Łodź. Your personal data will be processed for the recruitment processes in Nordea Bank Abp. You have a right to access your personal data, right to rectify and right to delete. Disclosing the personal data in the scope specified by the provisions of Polish Labour Code from 26 June 1974 and executive acts are mandatory. Providing personal data is necessary to conduct the recruitment processes. The request for the deletion of your personal data means resignation from further participation in recruitment processes and causes the immediate removal of your application. Detailed information concerning processing of your personal data can be found at: https://www.nordea.com/en/doc/nordea-privacy-policy-for-applicants.pdf
   

  

 We reserve the right to reply only to selected applications.

title: Desk Side Support Engineer
description:
Overview:

Maintain, analyse, troubleshoot, and repair computer systems, hardware and computer peripherals. Document, maintain, upgrade or replace hardware and software systems. Support and maintain user account information including rights, security and systems groups.
Responsibilities:  

Field incoming help requests from end users via both telephone and work orders in a courteous manner

* Document all pertinent end user identification information, including name, department, contact information, and nature of problem or issue
* Build rapport and elicit problem details from help desk customers
* Prioritize and schedule problems. Escalate problems (when required) to the appropriately experienced technician


Record, track, and document the help desk request problem-solving process, including all successful and unsuccessful decisions made, and actions taken, through to the final resolution
Qualifications: **Professional knowledge and qualifications required:**  

* A 4-year degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related discipline; (MBO ICT 4 level)
* 3+ years technical support experience in a computer-related area
* Ticket handling tools/cross team troubleshooting
* Strong verbal communication skills, including the ability to document operations procedures
* Strong customer service skills and the ability to deal all types of customer service requests
* Good analytical, communication, problem solving, and organizational skills
* Ability to effectively interact with a diverse user base
* Highly organized, result oriented, self-motivated and proactive
* Knowledge of basic computer hardware.
* Experience with desktop operating systems including Microsoft
* Good understanding of the organization's goals and objectives.
* Exceptional interpersonal skills, listening, and questioning skills.
* Strong documentation skills.
* MCSA Windows 10 / 11
* Knowledge of InTunes
* Active directory
* Network essentials
* Driver's license
* Swedish / English speaking writing

**Preferred Certifications**

title: Engineering Manager | Remote | Europe
description:
**The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination.**


n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact.


Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve:

* Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders
* Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects
* Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100)
* Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation

  

That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what *you* can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register.


We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us.


Your main goal will be to build and lead an engineering team that thrives in a fast-moving AI-native world - developing engineers, creating clarity, and delivering meaningful outcomes with strong technical judgment. This is a first-line engineering leadership role for someone who is deeply technical, but whose real strength is building teams: empowering engineers on their growth path, aligning stakeholders, and helping people move with confidence as technology, customer needs, and opportunities evolve quickly around them.

*We’re hiring Engineering Managers across multiple product and platform areas, and during the interview process you’ll be matched to a team based on your strengths and what you’re most excited to work on. Learn more about the teams and their focus areas here:* *https://www.notion.so/n8n/Discover-Engineering-n8n-1b65b6e0c94f80688f43d9bbc76023c3*

### **Build an empowered, high-performing team**

* Lead, coach, and develop a team of engineers, helping them grow in ownership, performance, and long-term career development.
* Create a high-trust environment where people can learn in action, make decisions with confidence, and do their best work together.
* Support hiring, onboarding, and team shaping as we continue scaling engineering at n8n.

### **Create clarity and confidence as the landscape evolves**

* Help your team stay focused and effective as priorities evolve, new opportunities emerge, and AI continues to reshape how products are built.
* Communicate clearly and credibly through change, giving engineers the context and direction they need to move forward with confidence.
* Turn complexity into momentum by helping your team focus on what matters most without getting slowed down by unnecessary uncertainty or process.

### **Drive execution with speed, judgment, and alignment**

* Partner closely with Product, Design, and other stakeholders to align on priorities, trade-offs, and what success looks like.
* Bring the right level of structure to your team, using process where it helps and keeping things lightweight where it doesn’t.
* Keep the team accountable to meaningful outcomes while balancing speed, quality, and long-term maintainability.

### **Lead with technical credibility**

* Bring enough technical depth to mentor engineers, challenge decisions thoughtfully, and maintain a high bar for engineering quality.
* Support architectural and delivery decisions across your area, helping the team make sound trade-offs around scalability, reliability, and speed.
* Step into technical details or code when needed to unblock or support the team, while keeping your primary focus on people leadership and team effectiveness.

**REQUIREMENTS**
----------------

### **Must-haves**

* **First-line engineering management experience:** You’ve been a first-line Engineering Manager for at least 2 years and have experience directly leading engineers in a growing product organization. You’ve led teams that shipped meaningful product or platform outcomes, and you know how to balance execution, quality, and team health.
* **Strong people leadership:** You know how to coach, give clear feedback, support career growth, and handle hard conversations with empathy, honesty, and accountability.
* **Composure in fast-moving environments:** You help your team stay focused, confident, and effective as priorities evolve, bringing optimism, sound judgment, and a clear path forward even when the environment is moving fast.
* **Hands-on experience as a software engineer:** You have a strong software engineering background and can confidently mentor engineers, contribute to system and architecture discussions, and assess technical trade-offs.
* **Comfortable being hands-on when needed:** You can go deep into technical details or code to unblock, challenge, or support your team, but you know your main job is not to be on the critical path.
* **Cross-functional alignment:** Experience collaborating with Product, Design, and other stakeholders, as you align different perspectives into a clear path forward.
* **High-growth SaaS experience:** You’ve worked in a high-growth SaaS company and know how to build strong teams, scale with intention, and are excited to reach ambitious goals together with your team.

### **Nice-to-haves**

* **TypeScript / Node.js familiarity:** You’ve worked with JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js and could quickly build context in our stack.
* **Open-source or developer tooling interest:** You’re excited by technical products, builder communities, and the challenges that come with extensible software and automation.
* **AI product exposure:** You’ve worked near AI-native products, AI features, or teams exploring how AI is changing product experiences and engineering execution.

**Why join us?**


At n8n, you’ll join at a moment where strong engineering leadership can have outsized impact. We’re building in a space that is moving quickly, and we see that as an opportunity: to help teams stay ambitious, grounded, and effective while shaping what great engineering leadership looks like in an AI-native company. You’ll play a key role in building teams that empower others, act with integrity, move with speed and efficiency, and think bigger than incremental improvement. In a remote-first company growing fast, your work will directly influence how we scale our engineering organization and build the future of automation.

*n8n is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*

*We can sponsor visas to Germany; for any other country, you need to have existing right to work.*

***Our company language is English.***

*You care about diversity and inclusion? We do too! Check out our* *Diversity, Inclusion and Belonging initiatives at n8n* *(**https://www.notion.so/n8n/Diversity-inclusion-and-belonging-n8n-c1bec2fff536422d868b1a438d990e35**).*

***Location disclaimer:*** *If you see multiple job postings for the same role, it is most likely because we're hiring remotely for this role and posting in different locations to make sure every potential candidate can see the role. Please apply to the location you're the most likely to work from in the future.*

**Benefits**
------------

* **Competitive compensation** – We offer fair and attractive pay.
* **Ownership** – Our core value is to “empower others,” and we mean it—you’ll get a slice of n8n with equity.
* **Work/life balance** – We work hard but ensure you have time to recharge:


	+ **Europe:** 30 days of vacation, plus public holidays wherever you are.
	+ **US:** 15 vacation days, 8 sick days, plus public holidays wherever you are.
* **Health & wellness** –


	+ **Europe:** We provide benefits according to local country norms.\*
	+ **US**: Multiple low-premium, low-deductible medical plans with coverage for individuals and families—plus a no-cost premium HDHP option with a pre-seeded HSA—along with dental and vision coverage.
* **Future planning** –


	+ **Europe:** We provide pension contributions according to local country norms.\*
	+ **US:** 401(k) retirement plan with a 4% employer match.
* **Financial security** –


	+ **Europe:** We provide benefits according to local country norms.\*
	+ **US:** Company-paid short-term and long-term disability insurance, plus life insurance to support you and your loved ones.
* **Career growth** – We hire rising stars who grow with us! You’ll get €1K (or equivalent) per year to spend on courses, books, events, or coaching to level up your skills.
* **A passionate team** – We love our product, and we prove it with regular hackathons where we see who can build the coolest thing with it!
* **Remote-first** – Our team works remotely across Europe, with regular off-sites for team bonding. Some roles, like sales in the US, are hybrid—please check the job description.
* **Giving back** – We're big fans of open source, and you'll get $100 per month to support projects you care about.
* **AI enablement –** We believe in working smarter—everyone gets an unlimited AI budget to explore and use the best tools to boost productivity and creativity.
* **Transparency** – We all know what everyone’s working on, how the company is doing—the whole shebang.
* **An ambitious but kind culture** – People love working here—our eNPS for 2024 is 94!
* *Country-specific details are provided in your contract.*

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description:
**Step into the role**


As a Mechanical Design Engineer at MilDef, you will work within a project team responsible for mechanical solutions and design structures in both internal and customer-specific projects. You will create manufacturing drawings and also test and verify the mechanical design within the project scope. Additionally, you will collaborate closely with other disciplines within the Engineering Department, providing support within your field of expertise.

**Key responsibilities**

* Lead mechanical design activities within assigned product development projects, ensuring compliance with environmental durability requirements - including vibration and shock resistance per military standards - while also meeting ingress protection (IP) specifications.
* Create and maintain Bills of Materials (BOM) and technical documentation to support traceable design history, efficient manufacturing, and long-term serviceability.
* Provide mechanical engineering expertise throughout the product development process to ensure robust, integrated, and manufacturable design solutions.
* Collaborate closely within cross-functional project teams to enable effective mechanical–electrical co-design throughout the product development process.
* Lead prototype assembly, perform mechanical validation testing, and refine designs through structured troubleshooting and verification.
* Ensure design documentation and configuration data comply with MilDef’s quality standards, PLM protocols, and applicable regulatory requirements.
* Report design progress, risks, and mitigation strategies to stakeholders, supporting proactive decision-making and on-time project delivery.

**What you bring**

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in mechanical engineering, product development, or a related technical field.
* At least 3 years of experience in a similar role.
* Proven proficiency with CAD tools and application of design-for-manufacturing principles within production-focused engineering environments.
* Strong communication skills and proven ability to collaborate effectively in cross-functional team environment.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both spoken and written.

**Get to know us**


At MilDef, you'll be part of a company that values hands-on involvement, strong team spirit, and the development of defense technology. With us, you will have the opportunity to develop new skills, contribute to cross-functional projects, and make a real impact on our continued success. We encourage continuous learning and collaboration, and we offer excellent opportunities for career development. We are proud to actively promote health and work-life balance. We do this, among other things, by offering attractive employee benefits and wellness initiatives, such as wellness activities during working hours.


Would you like to know more about MilDef, our products, and our culture? MilDef.com


For further information, please contact Andreas Hertzman,Mechanical Design Manager.

**Important information**


We conduct drug tests on all our future colleagues before employment.


Due to the nature of our operations, employment regardless of position may be subject to background and security related checks. For certain positions, additional requirements may apply, including security clearance, classification within a security category, or citizenship requirements.

***MilDef - WE ARMOR IT.***

*MilDef is a global systems integrator and full-spectrum provider specializing in rugged IT for military, government and critical infrastructure sectors. MilDef provides hardware, software, and services that shield and protect critical information streams and systems, when and where the stakes are the highest. MilDef’s products are sold to more than 200 customers through companies in Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, the United States and Australia, and through partner networks in more than 40 countries. MilDef was founded in 1997 and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021.*

**We kindly decline contact from advertising and recruitment sales.**


#LI-LB1

title: Fullstackutvecklare
description:
*Vill du vara med och utveckla nästa generations streamingupplevelse som används av miljontals tittare varje dag?* 
 Hos TV4 möts teknik, innovation, nyhetsjournalistik, sport och underhållning.
 *Nu söker vi flera erfarna fullstackutvecklare med olika bakgrunder inom webb, app och backend.*
**Varför du ska joina TV4**
* Du vill vara med och bygga nästa generations streamingupplevelse som används av miljontals tittare varje dag.
* Du gillar att arbeta i ett empowered, tvärfunktionellt team – där design, produkt och utveckling äger hela flödet från idé till produktion.
* Du trivs i team som verkligen lever och andas ständiga förbättringar
* Du vill jobba med AI - på riktigt - genom hela utvecklingsprocessen


**Vad du kommer att göra**
* Utveckla skalbara, snabba och lättanvända applikationer på olika typer av enheter
* Designa och utveckla skalbara mikrotjänster med fokus på prestanda, säkerhet och driftbarhet
* CI/CD-pipelines, tester och observability – se till att kod deployas snabbt och tryggt
* Hitta nya och effektiva arbetssätt
* Driva och äga projekt och spännande features tillsammans med kollegor med olika kompetenser


 Om dig
   

  

 Teamet behöver utvecklare från olika bakgrunder och med olika teknisk kompetens. Du behöver inte kunna allt, men för att klara av rollen som utvecklare ser vi gärna att du:
   

  

* Har ett par års erfarenhet av systemutveckling
* Tycker om att jobba fullstack - troligtvis har du spets i frontend-, webb & app, eller backend-utveckling. Exempel på tekniker vi använder idag är Typescript, Go, Node.js, Python, React, React Native, Expo, AWS.
* Har en fallenhet för systemtänk, du kan översätta den stora bilden till dess beståndsdelar och tillbaka
* Du har är nyfiken och är alltid öppen för att testa nya saker och lära dig mer
* Har anammat AI som verktyg för att lyfta din och ditt teams leverans
* Trivs med att ta stort ansvar och känner stolthet i att leverera hög kvalitet
* Trivs i krossfunktionellt samarbete och tar initiativ utan att tveka
* Värdesätter kodkvalitet, tillgänglighet & användarupplevelse


**Det är ett plus om du har:**
* Erfarenhet från streamingbranschen, inom ljud eller video.


 För att trivas och lyckas hos TV4 är du nyfiken, engagerad och trivs i en föränderlig miljö. Du erbjuds en inkluderande miljö där mångfald ses som en styrka.
   

  

**Mer om erbjudandet**
 Tjänsten är placerad i Stockholm (TV4-huset) med gångavstånd till Gärdets tunnelbana. Kontoret erbjuder eget gym, parkeringsgarage, restaurang samt takterrass. Rollen erbjuder även:
   

  

* Kollektivavtal, med tjänstepension, försäkringar och friskvårdsbidrag.
* Valfri telefon, MacBook Pro samt rabatter via Benify.
* Kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och möjlighet att vara med på en AI-first resa.


**Praktisk information**
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med 6 månaders provanställning
* Facklig tillhörighet: Unionen. Kontakta unionen@tv4.se för frågor.


 Vi tillämpar löpande urval och intervjuer – så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt! Den tjänsten tillsätts i samarbete med Safemind. Vid ytterligare frågor om tjänsten, välkommen att kontakta Linnea Stafferöd på Linnea.stafferod@safemind.se.
   

  

 Bakgrundskontroll ingår i processen.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Integration Engineer
description:
*Bankgirot har en unik ställning på Sveriges betalmarknad som nu genomgår den största transformationen i modern tid. Arbetet med att utveckla framtidens betalinfrastruktur är i full gång och vi behöver dig som vill vara en del av resan. Nu söker vi tre drivna personer som vill vara med och implementera, bygga och förvalta vår nya integrationsplattform.*
**Din roll**
 Som Integration Engineer på Bankgirot kommer du tillsammans med ditt team implementera och förvalta vår nya integrationsplattform. Teamet är nytt hos oss och kommer bestå av en Tech Lead och tre Engineers och har ett tydligt uppdrag att stärka Bankgirots integrationsförmåga. Arbetet omfattar både integrationer i low-code-plattformen och traditionell programmering där programmeringsgraden varierar beroende på projektens behov. Tillsammans med Tech Lead bidrar du till målbilden för integrationsområdet och etablerar best practices för plattformens användning.
   

  

 I ditt arbete utgår du från Center for Enablement där fokus ligger på att säkerställa gemensamma arbetssätt genom att arbeta nära projekt och värdeströmmar. På så vis bidrar teamet proaktivt genom att ge andra team verktyg och kompetens att själva driva integrationsarbetet på ett effektivt sätt. Rollen är central i Bankgirots tekniska transformation och ger utrymme att påverka både riktning och arbetssätt framåt.
   

  

**Vad vi söker**
 Vi söker flera Engineers där grad av senioritet kan variera. Oavsett nivå av senioritet är du driven, analytiskt och kommunikativ. För en mer junior profil behöver du ha minst två års erfarenhet av att arbeta med integration. För en mer senior profil söker vi dig med minst fem års erfarenhet av integration, gärna inom regulatorisk verksamhet eller finanssektorn. Vi ser även gärna att du har erfarenhet av migreringsprojekt från äldre Mainframe-system till nya integrationsplattformar.
   

  

 Gemensamt för tjänsterna:
   

  

  

* Erfarenhet av integrationsplattformar som Frends, MuleSoft eller IBM, samt API Management-verktyg som Azure API Management eller Google Apigee.
* Har en förståelse för modern integrationsteknik.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Kafka, SFTP, API-miljöer, Grafana, Docker och Kubernetes.
* Är bekväm med low-code och drag-and-drop lösningar men har även erfarenhet av programmering i språk som C#, Python, GO (Golang) eller SQL.
* Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att utveckla i Open Source-miljöer med React, Java och PostgreSQL.


**Ett utvecklande arbete med bra förmåner**
 På Bankgirot stöttar vi varandra och firar framgångar tillsammans. Vi tror att när människor mår bra och har balans i livet så levererar vi vårt allra bästa. Därför satsar Bankgirot stort på hälsa, välmående och generösa förmåner som bidrar till både trivsel och hållbarhet i arbetslivet.
   

  

**Intresserad?**
 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Bankgirot med Ants Tech Recruiters. Vid frågor eller funderingar, kontakta Ellika Ulltin på ellika.ulltin@ants.se eller 072-230 00 28. Urval sker löpande, så tveka inte att ansöka redan idag. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Övrig information**
 Du behöver ha goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska. Vi kommer lägga stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper i den här rekryteringen. Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning baserad i Liljeholmen i Stockholm.
   

  

 Innan anställning beslutas genomförs en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) om tjänsten innebär arbete med säkerhetsklassade uppgifter eller säkerhetskänslig verksamhet.
   

  

 Bankgirot är ett svenskt clearinghus och teknikbolag med över 60 års erfarenhet av att leverera finansiell infrastruktur till banker. I samverkan med betalsektorn ser vi till att privatpersoner och företag enkelt kan göra överföringar och betalningar. Bankgirot säkerställer att det nuvarande betalsystemet fungerar felfritt, samtidigt som vi utvecklar framtidssäkrade lösningar. Vi säkrar och utvecklar Sveriges betalningar.
   

  

 Läs mer på www.bankgirot.se
